message.content:
- Enduro3 is India's first and only adventure race
- It is organized by National Education Foundation (NEF)
- The race attracts participants of all ages and from different parts of India
- NEF Enduro3 has been held annually since 2003
- The team categories include Open, IT, Corporate, Amateur, Collegian, Junior, 40+, Doctors, Media, Teachers, and Family
- Each team must have at least one female member
- Activities in the race include trekking, cycling, river crossing, rappelling, paddling, navigation, and kayaking.
